chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2379 of 2016 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on CMA No.2372810/2020 (U/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.23557/19 (Contempt of Court) 3. For hearing of CMA No.27258/16 (1 R 10) 4. For hearing of CMA No.21130/16 (Contempt of Court) 5. For hearing of main case. -------------------------------------------------------------- 10.11.2020. Malik Altaf advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro, advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl. A.G. Sindh for respondents No.2 to 6 and 9. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition, if directions are issued to the respondents No.4 and 9 to get Dawood Wachani Goath, Sector 17, Baldia Town, Hub River, Karachi West demarcated in accordance with law and after fulfilling all the legal and codal formalities in this behalf. The respondents No.4&9 are directed to do the needful in this regard however, it is expected from the respondents No.4&9 that before demarcation they would call all the concerned in this behalf and do the needful in accordance with the law and prepare a demarcation report. Any person aggrieved with said demarcation report would be at liberty to seek his remedy in accordance with law in this behalf. It is also expected from the respondents No.4&9 that they would complete this exercise within a period of 3 months’ time from the date of the receipt of the order.

Any person aggrieved with said demarcation report would be at liberty to seek his remedy in accordance with law in this behalf. It is also expected from the respondents No.4&9 that they would complete this exercise within a period of 3 months’ time from the date of the receipt of the order. With these directions, this petition is disposed of along with all the listed and pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
